figures.title: 00 Visual Abstract
figures.caption: Executive visual summary of the full QRC usefulness atlas.

figures.title: 01 Property Landscape
figures.caption: Two-panel property map of observed and predicted QRC usefulness.

figures.title: 02 Sweep Barcode
figures.caption: Full sweep barcode by generator/control group and parameter variant.

figures.title: 03 Family Outcomes
figures.caption: Family outcome shares and advantage confidence intervals.

figures.title: 04 Advantage Distributions
figures.caption: Within-family QRC advantage distributions with bootstrap mean intervals.

figures.title: 05 Meta Model Evidence
figures.caption: Meta-model prediction, importance, robustness, and residual diagnostics.

figures.title: 06 Extended Feature Map
figures.caption: Extended feature correlations and family-level feature heatmap.

figures.title: 07 Quantum Attribution Guardrail
figures.caption: Paired J=1 versus J=0 control intervals and scatter.

figures.title: 08 Full Catalog Inventory
figures.caption: Full 50-row benchmark inventory with core properties and QRC advantage.

figures.title: 09 All Points Feature Regressions
figures.caption: All finite sweep rows plotted against top features with regression lines and confidence bands.

claim_boundary: The visual suite supports a dataset-categorization and meta-model claim. It does not claim broad average QRC superiority or a quantum coupling mechanism.
